coreServices.name: Junk Removal
coreServices.shortDesc: Items gone without the hassle — as easy as sending a few photos.

coreServices.name: Dump Trailer Rentals
coreServices.shortDesc: Load at your own pace with driveway-safe dump trailers, delivered and picked up fast.

commonItems: Appliances like refrigerators, washers, dryers, and ovens
constructionDebris: Debris from small demolition or renovation work

process.title: Get a Quote / Send a Photo
process.desc: Call or text a few clear photos of what you need removed. We respond quickly with a clear estimate.

process.title: Schedule
process.desc: Choose a time that works for you. We confirm and stay in touch before arrival.

process.title: Removal or Delivery
process.desc: We show up as planned, do the heavy lifting, and keep things easy start to finish.

pricing.model: Volume-based — priced by how much space items take up in the 18-yard dump trailer, not per item.
quoteIncludes: Time on-site to complete the job
affectFactors: Carrying items up or down stairs
Items needing special handling or disposal
pricing.trailerPricing: Dump trailer rental pricing depends on trailer size, rental duration, and project type.
pricing.fastestQuote: Text clear photos from a few angles for the fastest accurate quote.
